reviews.review_title: Really angry straight up trash no joke
reviews.review_description: To the developers come on guys you know you could have done better than this is this some type of joke because I feel extremely robbed for my little $21 this game should be a dollar maybe less the controls are messed up throws you out of the car flips your car throws you behind the game pixels everywhere nothing works the way it's supposed to absolutely nothing I am so angry right now that was my last $21 and I was debating on getting a few other games that I know for a fact would have worked better but I chose to give it to you guys which I exceedingly regret you guys knew this game was broken and yet you still sell it for this higher price that's a scam please return my money immediately and I urge anyone else to never buy this unless they do some updates and fixes cuz this is ridiculous disrespectful false advertising feels like some type of Ponzi scheme to get our money knowing that this game is extremely broken on every level did not buy this give me my money back I'm going to meta to get it back the easiest just to put it back when you got it from like Shadow out

Poor control, tons of lagging, terrible graphics.  Game play is also aweful.  The concept of the game is great, but excecution is a gross disappointment. It's terrible, hopefully a million updates are coming.
Horrible car was terrible to drive just all bad I want my money back

I do not like this game very much the driving is hard to use. It is glitchy and it is also getting nighttime too quick. And the missions are too far apart with the driving like that I won’t be getting there until eight hours later. ￼

The game is pretty fun but I don’t know how to turn the day/night cycle to go a little slower because it turns night time in like 2 seconds I love the cheat menu please keep that also please add like a car dealership the game is amazing and I like the concept but there was a npc in his car I was about to steal then they disappeared so I hope there is more to come to this amazing game I like it I like the guns I will for sure play it more as yall update it and writing my first game review as a 13 is crazy but thank you for this game it’s good, please if you can make the hands a little smaller

developer_response.body: thank you very much for your review I'm aware of the bug you mentioned and a few others that are still in the game I'm currently working on performance optimizations which should help me solve that bug and many others. I'm also learning how to add multiplayer in another smaller project right now and once I have that all figured out I plan to release a performance and multiplayer update for Wasted Shot, but I want to work out all the kinks fist in this smaller project to avoid redesigning the open world map too many times. I've had one other person ask to make the hands smaller I tried to find a simple solution to make smaller hands an option in the menu for players but it created a surprising amount of glitches and bugs. Unfortunately there is still a lot for me to fix and add to the game and I think the smaller hands option will have to wait for now. I could add a dealership with  the NPC interactions update I was working on before I switched to fixing performance quality, and adding an option to slow the day/night cycle should be relatively easy I'll see if I can get that done today and hopefully have a small update out later tonight. Maybe I'll have an option to remove night time too I know the maps night time lighting still needs a lot of work too. Once again thank you for the review.

reviews.review_description: Add blood like when you shoot people and punch them.

developer_response.body: Thank you, and good idea, I'll add it to the list.

reviews.review_description: Pls add robbing people pls and add a police shootout pls? 10/10 game having fun on it

developer_response.body: Thank you that's a good idea I can add that!

reviews.review_title: A version of GTA in VR
reviews.review_description: I know for awhile now we’ve all been waiting for THAT gta to come to life. But coming upon Wasted Shot I couldn’t be even more satisfied. There’s so much potential put into this game. I can’t wait to see/ enjoy what else is in-store. Car mechanics are pretty awesome not to hard. Favorite part is being able to heal myself, especially with the cigar. You can see the details and all the efforts put into this game. I.E the weapons!

developer_response.body: Thank you. I'm glad you like it. There's much more to come.

reviews.review_description: This game could have some fun potential but as of now it's very raw and clunky. Graphics don't render quickly and the driving mechanics are jank. Walking feels rough. It's got a good idea going but really needs some tlc. Right now it's practically unplayable. Will update as it gets developed.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the reviewing. I've been working on the game a lot since your review and there were a lot of issues with vehicles that I've patched, and I've made a lot of optimization improvements with the graphics. I was wondering if you could elaborate as to what specifically feels rough to you about the walking? and if you have any other issues I'd love to know so I may address them to the best of my abilities. Thank you.
